latestCheckpoint.summary: Foundation scrub completed with five concrete fixes.
latestCheckpoint.understanding: The foundation memory packages had latent truthfulness gaps around roadmap ref normalization, research artifact updates, stale linked-record discrepancy reporting, projected ticket drift detection, and plan dashboard snapshot stability.
recentChanges: Normalized constitution roadmap item path refs to canonical IDs before lookup.
Preserved research artifact bodies on metadata-only updates.
Made initiative reads/dashboard handling resilient to stale linked roadmap/spec/ticket refs.
Tightened spec ticket reprojection drift detection across all projection-owned fields.
Stabilized plan dashboard linked-ticket counts and snapshot cloning.
latestCheckpoint.nextAction: Hand completed scope to manager for consolidation and closure.

approval.summary: Foundation worker changes are approved for consolidation.
rationale: Targeted package tests passed for all touched foundation packages.

consolidation.summary: Foundation worker changes were consolidated into the main workspace patch.
